title: Rewrite recursive fibonacci with pattern-matched heads + memoization
prompt: Write `MyApp.Fib.fib/1` as pattern-matched function heads for `fib(0)`, `fib(1)`, and the recursive `fib(n) when is_integer(n) and n > 1`. Add a memoized version `fib_memo/1` that uses `Process.get/1` and `Process.put/2` to cache results. The memoized version must also use pattern-matched heads. Output a complete `defmodule MyApp.Fib do ... end`.

must_contain: def fib(n) when is_integer(n) and n > 1

tier_rationale: Classic fibonacci as function heads plus process-dict memoization.
